subcodes.first_line: Say: O thou speckled one! The Virgin doth ask thee concerning her daughters. Tell what thou hast decreed concerning them, O thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا ایتها الرقشاء ان البتول تسئلک عن بناتها بینی ما افتیت علیهن و یا ایها
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom
